taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 2+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR equivalent experience
preferred_quals: Master's Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 3+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 5+ years technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR equivalent experience, Proficiency in Python, C#, and TypeScript, Experience with AI frameworks such as LangChain, Semantic Kernel, and orchestration tools like Autogen, Familiarity with LLMs (Large Language Models), vector databases, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines, Experience, ability, and willingness to work collaboratively and independently with others on the implementation of large, distributed systems, Solid grasp of security, compliance, and data governance in enterprise environments, Familiarity with Microsoft 365 extensibility, Copilot Studio, and Microsoft Graph API, Knowledge of MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agent coordination protocols, Contributions to open-source AI or agentic frameworks
core_responsibilities: Architect and implement scalable, secure, and compliant multi-agent systems using LLMs, orchestration frameworks, and Microsoft’s AI stack, Integrate agents with Microsoft Graph, Power Platform, and internal APIs to enable cross-system intelligence and automation, Define and enforce architectural standards for agent interoperability, real-time processing, and fault tolerance, Drive performance optimization and observability improvements across agentic workflows, Oversee Live Site operations for agentic systems, ensuring reliability, rapid incident response, and continuous improvement, Ensure compliance with Microsoft’s Responsible AI and security standards, including Role Based Access Control (RBAC), data masking, and audit logging, Collaborate with partner engineering teams to build extensible frameworks that support third-party agent development and deployment
job_summary: Microsoft is a leading technology company focused on empowering every person and organization to achieve more. They are seeking a skilled Developer to lead the design, development, and scaling of AI-powered multi-agent systems, ensuring integration with Microsoft 365 and driving innovation in agentic architecture.
